introduction: When Sang Woo (Jeong Han Yong) participated in the political demonstrations is held in prison, Hyun Min (Lee Young Ha) and Young Kyu (Yu In Chon) are frustrated. Yonggyu wakes up with the opposition of his parents and sets up a prefectural witness to marry Eugene (Choi Myung-gil).However, after the honeymoon trip, Eugene leaves Eugene leaving her child, leaving her to study abroad. Hyunjin, who loves Eugene in her heart, falls into frustration and marries Hegin, a prostitute. Sang-woo, who has been released, encourages citizens to participate in the resistance movement by using the people-resisting poetry, but he is only getting to the bottom. After returning from studying abroad, Eugene listens to the residents of the prefecture by listening to Sang Woo. With the help of Eugene, Hyun, who realizes that he is living in a clear existence in history, publishes a poetry book and two people go on a honeymoon trip announcing their marriage.
